boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; policy requires full endorsement authority plus insurance-status class closure before execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-IRI-089-P requires endorsement authority match on contractor, site, coverage, date, and insurance-status class.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect remains open: pending CE-12 and separate status-class verification required.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: 082-style status-class trap unresolved; authority does not match work start date and coverage type.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records show open boundary: END-IRI-089 endorsement pending and WARN-IRI-089 requires separate insurance-status verification. Policy STD-IRI-089-P demands exact match on all elements before site start. Escalate for closure.
